holdings.infoBox: MIDU is an equity ETF with a total of 411 individual holdings. The top holdings are Goldman Finl Sq Trsry Inst 506 stock at 19.68%, Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins at 11.05%, S&P Mid Cap 400 Index Swap at 8.73%, S&P Mid Cap 400 Index Swap at 5.36%, and S&P Mid Cap 400 Index Swap at 5.20%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily Mid Cap Bull 3X ETF (MIDU) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Mid Cap 400 index. The fund provides 3x leveraged exposure to a market cap-weighted index of US mid-cap companies. MIDU was launched on Jan 8, 2009 and is issued by Direxion.
